calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16(C)(1)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CORINNA MEISSNER, WARREN WEBSTER, JAMI TENCATI AND HASSARD BONNINGTON, LLP'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16(C)(1) is denied. Carpenter & Zuckerman v. Cohen (2011) 195 Cal. App. 4th 373 holds that a law firm and its partners are not entitled to an award of fees per the anti-SLAPP statute when they are represented by attorneys at the same law firm. This case requires denial of this motion. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Barry Endick of Hassard Bonnington LLP telephone number 415-288-9800 for Defendants.

Mr. Endick requested that the matter be continued. The Court advised Counsel that the matter needs to be reassigned by the Presiding Judge. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CORINNA MEISSNER, WARREN WEBSTER, JAMI TENCATI, AND HASSARD BONNINGTON, LLP'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is being transferred to Dept. 206 for reassignment.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
